statement: In every magma, Equation 3238 (`x = (((y * z) * w) * z) * y`) implies Equation 3287 (`x * x = y * (y * (z * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0602
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y z) w) z) y)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op y (op z w)))
